name: ExecuteCommand
description: Terminal-style UX component for running scripts with arguments and tailing log output
useCase: Test and run any registered script/capability with configurable args, live log output, process control

usage.note: This is a UI component, not a script. Load it in the Transaction Layer and pass a config with command + args.

name: Hello World
description: Greeting script that takes a name and logs hello in 3 languages
useCase: Demo/test script for validating the ExecuteCommand component

name: Disk Usage Monitor
description: Checks disk usage and warns if any mount is over 80%
useCase: System health check for disk space monitoring
